subcodes.first_line: These are the Days of God, and all creation standeth in rapture, yearning and attraction to the Beloved - the soul whose fragrance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایام ایام الله است و جمیع آفرینش در وله و شوق و انجذاب محبوب نفسیکه رایحه
subcodes.subjects: @nearness and remoteness, @spiritual transformation, @call to action, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
